name: Diet Tofu Quiche
recipeInstructions:
To prepare crust:
1. Beat egg with 2 tbsp water, dill weed, and onion powder.
2. Add 2 tbsp bran to the mixture.
3. Allow the dough to stand for at least 10 minutes.
4. Pour the dough into the bottom of a nonstick cake pan.
To prepare filling:
1. Blend tofu, egg, and 3/4 cup cooked vegetables (asparagus or spinach) with enough water until smooth.
5. Pour the tofu-egg mixture into the center of the crust.
6. The bran will be pushed to the edges of the pan, forming a crust around the filling.
7. Place cooked mushrooms and onion on top of the filling in a decorative circle around the edges of the pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until the filling is set and the top is browned.
